testsuite.name: E2E — Password Recovery contra backend real

testcase.name: POST /intrale/confirm con codigo invalido responde error

testsuite.system-out: 19:14:32.059 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Iniciando Playwright [ApiPasswordRecoveryE2ETest] — baseUrl=http://localhost:80, recordings=C:\Workspaces\Intrale\platform\qa\recordings 19:14:32.959 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Tracing iniciado [ApiPasswordRecoveryE2ETest] 19:14:33.477 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Recovery con email seed: status=200 19:14:33.477 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Recovery body: {"statusCode":{"value":200,"description":"OK"}} 19:14:33.506 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Recovery sin body: status=400 19:14:33.540 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Confirm sin codigo: status=400 19:14:33.560 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Confirm con codigo invalido: status=400 19:14:33.854 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Trace guardado: C:\Workspaces\Intrale\platform\qa\recordings\ApiPasswordRecoveryE2ETest-trace.zip 19:14:33.918 [Test worker] INFO ar.com.intrale.e2e - Cerrando Playwright [ApiPasswordRecoveryE2ETest]
